projects.name: Solar + Energy Storage on Garage
projects.description: Install 5-7 solar panels on south-facing garage roof face (20x12 ft, ~2-2.8 kW) plus battery storage. Solar = standalone ROI investment (~5yr payback at $0.42/kWh). Battery = generator alternative (no lot space for generator). 30% federal ITC applies to both when paired.
projects.notes: DESIGN: South garage face only. 5 portrait panels = 2.0 kW; 7 mixed = 2.8 kW. ~3,200-4,500 kWh/yr production (20-26% offset). All-in after ITC: solar ~$9-10k, battery ~$9-10k. VENDORS: Sunergy (sunergy.com) — EnergySage 2026 CA Installer of Year, Enphase Platinum, no door-to-door. NRG Clean Power (nrgcleanpower.com) — Diamond Certified, 35yr, San Mateo County, 40yr warranty. Tesla Energy (tesla.com/energy) — online only. AVOID: Sunrun.

tasks.title: Analyze energy usage and size system
tasks.notes: 17,178 kWh/yr at $0.42/kWh avg. Target: 5-7 panels south garage face (20x12 ft) = 2-2.8 kW. ~5yr payback after ITC.

tasks.title: Research and shortlist solar installers
tasks.notes: Shortlist: Sunergy (sunergy.com, Enphase Platinum, no door-to-door), NRG Clean Power (nrgcleanpower.com, Diamond Certified, San Mateo County), Tesla Energy (tesla.com/energy, online only). Avoid Sunrun.

tasks.title: Contact installers for quotes
tasks.notes: Spec: south garage face (20x12 ft, 5-7 panels, ~2-2.8 kW), paired battery (Enphase IQ or Powerwall 3), detached garage sub-panel interconnect. Ask each for: $/W, panel brand, inverter type, battery spec, warranty, timeline, ITC total. Request free shade/LIDAR analysis.

tasks.title: Compare quotes and select installer
tasks.notes: Prefer Enphase microinverters over string inverter. Compare $/W, battery spec, warranty, timeline. 30% ITC on full system incl. battery.

tasks.title: Confirm ITC timing — credit files in year PTO is granted
tasks.notes: 30% federal ITC on Form 5695. Claimed in tax year Permission to Operate granted by PG&E. Battery qualifies only when solar-paired. Plan install timing accordingly.

needs_attention.title: Contact installers for quotes

observations.summary: It's Wednesday afternoon and Roxanne is in the kitchen area, likely continuing her routine of tidying up or preparing something as she has been for the past few hours. The living room remains quiet and undisturbed.
Music in main_bathroom: Black Caviar - Waiting My Whole Life For This
Music in main_bathroom: Mf'n Music - Heart of the City (Who Dat)
Music in main_bathroom: Graffiti Ghosts - I'm So Close I Can Taste It
Music in main_bathroom: Rob Bailey & The Hustle Standard - Beast - Southpaw Remix
It's Wednesday afternoon and Posey is resting peacefully in her bed in the entryway. The house remains quiet, consistent with the calm atmosphere noted in recent activity.
Music in main_bathroom: FLOYD WONDER - drop the confetti
Music in main_bathroom: King Flexx - Run It Up
Music in main_bathroom: C. Henry - Motivation

insights.summary: There is a high-severity pattern involving multiple unknown individuals: an unknown adult male worker is performing maintenance on the front porch, and multiple camera flags point to unknown people (including one in the kitchen). This suggests the home is currently under the influence of external or unexpected visitors, which warrants increased monitoring and confirmation of their identity and purpose.
Unusually high activity at living_room this hour: 5 observations vs typical 1 for weekday 13:00
Consistent evening energy spike: avg peak 3.68 kWh/hr typically around 19:00 PDT across 2 days. Likely AC/HVAC cooling cycle. At $0.35/kWh this peak window costs ~$7.72/evening.
An unknown adult male is on the porch performing maintenance, which is consistent with the activity recorded at 12:18.
Unknown adult male working near the front porch — could be a scheduled worker or someone performing unannounced maintenance.

The high volume of activity and the presence of multiple unknown individuals (flagged previously) are correlated with a sustained, high-energy background of music and cleaning/tidying routines, suggesting that the home is currently undergoing a significant, structured clean-up or preparation phase, likely involving external help or multiple family members working together.
Unusually high activity at entryway this hour: 4 observations vs typical 1 for weekday 12:00
An unknown person is in the kitchen area, which is unusual given Roxanne's recent activity there.
An unknown adult female is visible in the hallway while Roxanne is in the kitchen, which is a change from the recent activity.

Despite the routine nature of Roxanne's work and the presence of the family, the system is flagging multiple instances of unknown external workers and adults. This suggests that the current high level of activity is not solely internal, and Steve should be aware of who is present in the home.
